name: Vislink Technologies, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Vislink Technologies, Inc., is a global technology business that collects, delivers, and manages high-quality, live video and associated data from the action scene to the viewing screen. We provide RF and 5G solutions for collecting live news, sports, entertainment, and news events for the broadcast, surveillance, and defense markets with real-time video intelligence using a range of transmission products.
